headlines.title_cn: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
headlines.title_en: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
headlines.summary_cn: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.
headlines.summary_en: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.

headlines.title_cn: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
headlines.title_en: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
headlines.summary_cn: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be comprised of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.
headlines.summary_en: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be comprised of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.

headlines.title_cn: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
headlines.title_en: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
headlines.summary_cn: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.
headlines.summary_en: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.

items.title_cn: Almost half of U.S. singles feel negatively about AI in dating, Match says
items.title_en: Almost half of U.S. singles feel negatively about AI in dating, Match says
items.summary_cn: About 47% of singles look negatively at the use of AI in dating -- but, many dating app users are open to AI helping with profile punch-ups and conversation starters.
items.summary_en: About 47% of singles look negatively at the use of AI in dating -- but, many dating app users are open to AI helping with profile punch-ups and conversation starters.

items.title_cn: Amazon hopes to challenge Nvidia more directly by selling its AI chips
items.title_en: Amazon hopes to challenge Nvidia more directly by selling its AI chips
items.summary_cn: AWS is in talks to sell its chips to other data centers. CEO Andy Jassy has said this represents a $50 billion opportunity for the company.
items.summary_en: AWS is in talks to sell its chips to other data centers. CEO Andy Jassy has said this represents a $50 billion opportunity for the company.

items.title_cn: AI data centers just got a government-mandated fast lane to the grid
items.title_en: AI data centers just got a government-mandated fast lane to the grid
items.summary_cn: FERC told grid operators to give data centers a fast lane for interconnections, but it failed to address electricity supply shortages.

items.title_cn: The smartphone era created an attention crisis. Slowtech is fixing it
items.title_en: The smartphone era created an attention crisis. Slowtech is fixing it
items.summary_cn: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”
items.summary_en: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”
